title: Blocklist
helpOutput:
Usage: blocklist [<options>] <domain>

  Check a domain against URI and domain blocklists.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <domain>  Domain name to check against blocklists
